Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The waves that lap on the shore[n]are sparkling and shimmering...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked me to[n]get her something that feels like the ocean...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a tiny crab walking beneath the water.[n]Elizabeth might be happy if I gave it to her.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's a tiny crab walking beneath the water.[n]It'd make a great memento of Yakushima.[n]{f 1 1}
